GateDocument.TextWithNodes: "Your first look at NIVEA's new limited edition deodorant, designed by Australian label By Johnny", "Schembri is one of three leading Australian fashion designers hand-picked by Vogue Australia, in partnership with NIVEA, to create designs for a new range limited edition deodorant. "It was so great to work with NIVEA and Vogue on an exclusive design for Black & White Clear deodorant," Schembri says of the project. "It's been an exciting collaboration." Schembri was assigned NIVEA's iconic product, the Black & White Clear Deodorant, which is so named because its formula will keep your designer pieces in pristine condition—it's a deodorant that is designed to prevent marks on clothing. This appealed to the By Johnny design sensibility of effortless elegance. "Many of my bold and geometric designs can be worn day-to-day or for that special event and any time you want to look your best. It is so important to feel put-together and this deodorant is perfect for that," says Schembri. "It keeps you dry and protects your garments so your blacks stay black and your whites stay white for longer, which is key to creating a really polished look." Unsightly deodorant marks are definitely something to avoid but when it comes to the efficacy of a deodorant, we know it's not all about the way it looks—NIVEA's Black & White Clear deodorant also works. This range, which is available in both aerosol and roll-on, offers 48-hour antiperspirant protection and its gentle formula works hard to care for your skin. Schembri said when designing for NIVEA Black & White Clear deodorant he remained true to his brand's vivid, graphic design ethos - as represented in the bright pink and contrasting black accents. "I created a few designs that were true to my aesthetic and I think the one I settled on is very representative of what I do. It was about bringing together contrasting colours and graphic elements in my bold signature style." For Schembri, this project wasn't all that different from creating a dress, as his focus is always on empowering the wearer. "I love it when I see someone bringing one of my designs to life, seeing them feeling confident, putting a spin on the styling and making it their own. That's what makes me happy." You can shop the limited edition deodorant here."
